# Crownwood Chemicals

> Manufacturer of polymer soil stabilization chemicals and provider of heavy construction services in Texas.

## Products

### Permabase Black™
Polymer bio-enzyme soil stabilizer with carbon-black tint. Permanently alters expansive clay, eliminates PM10 dust, and provides an asphalt-like aesthetic finish.
Learn more: [Permabase Black](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/chemicals/permabase-black)

### Permabase™ (Standard)
Clear polymer bio-enzyme soil stabilizer for permanent expansive clay stabilization and dust control.
Learn more: [Permabase](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/chemicals/permabase)

### MeltDown MR-1™
Soy-based 2-in-1 asphalt remover and release agent. Removes cured asphalt, tar, and tack oil while preventing adhesion to equipment. One product replaces separate remover and release agent.
Learn more: [MeltDown MR-1](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/chemicals/meltdown)

### PHPM-50™
Commercial-grade, hydro-reactive pothole repair polymer. Cures permanently in standing water and extreme temperatures with zero setup downtime.
Learn more: [PHPM-50](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/chemicals/phpm-50)

## Construction Services

- [Asphalt Paving](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/construction/asphalt-paving) — Parking lots, roadways, overlays, tear-outs, mill-and-overlay
- [Concrete](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/construction/concrete) — Flatwork, ADA ramps, loading docks, dumpster pads, demolition
- [Sealcoating](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/construction/sealcoat) — Commercial parking lot sealcoating, crack routing, preservation
- [Striping](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/construction/striping) — ADA parking lot striping, thermoplastic, CAD layout design
- [Land Clearing](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/construction/land-clearing) — Site prep, grading, forestry mulching, brush clearing
- [Hydro Seeding](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/construction/hydro-seeding) — Erosion control, SWPPP compliance, revegetation

## Knowledge Hub
- [The Ultimate Guide to Sealcoating](https://crownwoodchemicals.com/knowledge-hub/ultimate-guide-to-sealcoating) — Types, brands, application rates, brand comparisons

## Service Area
Texas — San Antonio, Austin, Bexar County, and surrounding regions.
